purpose: Convert dress, robe, gown, and skirted reference images into clean headless and handless female T-pose modular renders with ground-length capped bottoms when appropriate.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative female upper-body T-pose, arm length, width, cutoff, anatomy, and framing template.

front.label: Female Robe / Dress Front
front.description: Front-facing technical modular dress or robe render using the locked female upper-body silhouette.

back.label: Female Robe / Dress Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same capped-bottom dress or robe from the approved front view.
